name: Nectarines in Cointreau Raspberry Caramel
recipeInstructions:
1. Slit the nectarine skins with a sharp knife and plunge the fruit into boiling water for 30 seconds. Remove with a slotted spoon and peel.
2. Halve the fruit and remove the stones.
3. In a saucepan, combine sugar with 1/2 cup water. Stir over heat without boiling until the sugar dissolves. Bring to a boil and cook until golden.
4. Remove from heat and stir in an additional 1 1/2 cups of cold water. Stir over low heat until smooth and well combined.
5. Add raspberries and stand for 5 minutes.
6. Process until smooth.
7. Return to the saucepan and bring to a medium boil.
8. Reduce heat, add nectarines, and simmer for 3-5 minutes, or until lightly poached.
9. Pack nectarines into sterilized jars.
10. Stir Cointreau into raspberry syrup and pour over the fruit.
11. Seal while hot and refrigerate for up to 2 weeks before using.
12. Serve at room temperature with chilled mascarpone and crisp wafer biscuits, if desired.
Serves 8.
